div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 280px; text-align: center; width: 280px;

span.p:
Manually place the liquid cooling manifold on the tray,
then manually connect the manifold and fixture piping

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 280px; text-align: center; width: 280px;

span.p:
Manually push the fixture plate into the chamber,
then press the start button

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 280px; text-align: center; width: 280px;

span.p:
The vacuum chamber door closes automatically,
and the chamber sealing mechanism automatically seals
the gas passage block on the fixture plate

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 280px; text-align: center; width: 280px;

span.p:
Automatically evacuate the vacuum chamber,
while filling high-pressure gas into the manifold workpiece
to perform gross leak detection

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 280px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(127, 29, 29) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 280px; text-align: center; width: 280px;

span.p:
Alarm; automatically vent the manifold workpiece,
fill the chamber and open the chamber door

div.style: color: rgb(127, 29, 29) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 280px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 280px; text-align: center; width: 280px;

span.p:
After nitrogen discharge,
pre-evacuate the manifold workpiece to the set value

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 280px; text-align: center; width: 280px;

span.p:
When the chamber reaches the set vacuum level,
the leak detection valve opens;
helium is filled into the manifold workpiece
for micro leak detection

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 280px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(127, 29, 29) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 280px; text-align: center; width: 280px;

span.p:
Alarm; automatically recover helium,
fill the chamber and open the chamber door

div.style: color: rgb(127, 29, 29) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 280px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(20, 83, 45) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 280px; text-align: center; width: 280px;

span.p:
Automatically recover helium,
fill the chamber and open the chamber door

div.style: color: rgb(20, 83, 45) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 280px; text-align: center;
